mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_check_photo ( check_id, photo_gb, img_path, img_name, sort_ord, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{checkId}, #{photoGb}, #{imgPath}, #{imgName}, #{sortOrd}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT photo_id, check_id, photo_gb, img_path, img_name, sort_ord, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_dt FROM daily_check_photo WHERE check_id = #{checkId} ORDER BY photo_gb ASC, sort_ord ASC, photo_id ASC
SELECT photo_id, check_id, photo_gb, img_path, img_name, sort_ord, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_dt FROM daily_check_photo WHERE photo_id = #{photoId}
